date_notes: Event anchored to the April 2012 federal budget funding reduction. Note: distinct from the later April 2014 announcement of 657 job cuts (which R-002's title describes). R-002 needs review — its title/date may correspond to the 2014 round rather than the 2012 budget. Confirm which event R-002 documents and re-source if needed.
title_en: Federal budget cuts CBC funding by $115M over three years
title_fr: Le budget fédéral réduit le financement de la CBC de 115 M$ sur trois ans
description_en: The 2012 federal budget reduces CBC/Radio-Canada funding by $115 million phased over three years. The broadcaster subsequently announced job and programming reductions. Documented as part of the public-information environment of this period.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type

verification_notes: DATE/SOURCE MISMATCH: event is the April 2012 budget funding cut ($115M/3yr), but R-002's title ('CBC cuts 657 jobs') describes the April 2014 announcement — these are different events ~2 years apart. The corpus .txt for R-001/R-002 also contained the wrong article (a mall-roof-collapse story) — a harvest error. ACTION: re-harvest R-002; attach a 2012-budget source (e.g. Globe 'CBC to cut 650 jobs', Apr 4 2012) for this event, or split into a separate 2014 event if both are wanted.
